title: Senior Program Manager, People Team (NYC)
confirmation_message: Thank you for applying. We've received your application. Our Recruiting team will review your information as soon as possible and follow up with next steps via email.
attached_resume_confirmed: YES — filename chip 'resume.pdf' read back visually on the form (Resume/CV field) before submit; this is the tailored Datadog resume built + rendered + visually verified in this run.
attached_cover_confirmed: YES — filename chip 'cover_letter.pdf' read back visually (Cover Letter field).
fit: GO with acknowledged stretch — JD asks 5+ yrs program mgmt; Jamie has ~3 yrs. Cover is honest about this ('this role asks for more years than I have'). All resume content maps to real experience: 20+ programs / 10+ vendors / 70+ staff / -75% onboarding / 25+ stakeholders / 600+ webinar participants / 78% enrollment (InGenius); $362K leave-cost executive insight + NGO leadership diagnosis (ODN, collective); 2,000+ employee analysis -> C-suite (NextGen).
resume_tailoring: People Program Management recipe: summary identity 'People Program Management'; InGenius title 'Program Manager, Enablement', Bullet Set B (cross-functional processes, listening sessions, program enrollment rate) at full richness; ODN = 3 bullets covering both projects (diagnostic discovery + $362K executive insight + NGO accountability), collective framing, labeled 'Organization Development Network (ODN) Oregon'; NextGen/Vestas/Kronos = 4 bullets each; Wesleyan Relevant Coursework kept; header 'Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)'. 1 page, no bullet wraps, even margins, autoFit verified. No banned content.

answers.Country: United States (US flag shown in country selector)
answers.Are you legally authorised to work full-: Yes, but I will need sponsorship in the future. (TRUTHFUL sponsorship disclosure — Jamie holds valid H-1B now, requires sponsorship/transfer for a new employer. NOTE: there was no separate 'do you require sponsorship' question on this form; this work-auth question is the only one and it discloses sponsorship.)
answers.In what cities are you available to work: New York City + Remote (open to relocation; truthful)
answers.Veteran Status: I am not a protected veteran
answers.Disability Status: No, I do not have a disability and have not had one in the past

captcha: Invisible reCAPTCHA Enterprise (badge present, size=invisible). Executed in background on Submit; NO interactive challenge surfaced; submission completed to confirmation page. Not bypassed.
